nodes.label: Design Guidelines
nodes.description: Canonical design system for VENLAX Sports: light-only theme, sport colors (tennis=#10B981, cricket=#2563EB, pickleball=#F97316), typography (Outfit headings, DM Sans body), bento grid layouts, glassmorphism sticky header, flat cards with hover elevation, data-testid requirement
nodes.rationale: Archetype 2 'Performance Pro' light variant chosen to project competitive, professional feel without dark UI that could feel heavy; light mode mandated to keep content readable across devices

nodes.label: Skills Lock
nodes.description: Pinned skill versions: copywriting from sickn33/antigravity-awesome-skills, frontend-design from anthropics/claude-code plugins

nodes.label: Claude Project Settings
nodes.description: Project-level Claude Code permissions: allowlisted Bash commands for API health checks and skill invocations

nodes.label: Claude Local Settings
nodes.description: Local Claude Code permissions: extensive allowlist for yarn/craco builds, Coolify MCP tools, WebSearch/WebFetch domains, git operations, Python test commands, Stitch design tools

nodes.label: Logo Generator Script
nodes.description: Python script using Gemini 2.5 Flash Image (Imagen 4) to generate 10 minimalist VENLAX logo variations via Google Generative Language API. Prompts explore wordmark styles using brand colors teal (#10B981), orange (#F97316), black

nodes.label: Auth Utils
nodes.description: JWT creation/verification (HS256, 24h access + 7d refresh), bcrypt password hashing, get_current_user/get_optional_user middleware reading httpOnly cookies or Bearer header, require_admin role check, serialize_public_user PII stripper

nodes.label: Email Service
nodes.description: aiosmtplib-based email sender with console fallback when SMTP_HOST unset. Provides typed senders: match_scheduled, score_reported, registration_confirmed, password_reset, partner_invite, league_started, playoff_qualified, OTP, schedule_released, season_open, last_spots, waitlist_open, partner_declined, generic. Includes fire-and-forget schedule() helper

nodes.label: Pydantic Models
nodes.description: All MongoDB document models: BaseDocument (_id<->id coercion), User, League (flex|round_robin, division tiers, box config), RRConfig, DoublesInvite, Team (cricket), Match (RR/flex/doubles), Standing (ELO points formula), PlayerLeague, PaymentTransaction, Challenge, Season (box_assignments), Ladder, LadderChallenge

nodes.label: Notification Dispatch
nodes.description: Capacity-milestone notification dispatcher called from league_routes. Four triggers: dispatch_season_open (new league), dispatch_filling_fast (50% capacity, push only), dispatch_last_spots (80% capacity, email+push), dispatch_waitlist_open (full, email+push). Uses pywebpush for Web Push with VAPID, cleans up 410 Gone subscriptions

nodes.label: Phase Config
nodes.description: Backend phase gating mirror of frontend platformConfig.js. Phase 1=USA Tennis+Pickleball+Stripe/USD (active), Phase 2=adds Cricket, Phase 3=India Cricket+Tennis+Pickleball+Razorpay/INR. Controls ACTIVE_SPORTS, ACTIVE_COUNTRY, CURRENCY, PAYMENT_PROVIDER
nodes.rationale: Phase-driven gating ensures data for all regions exists in MongoDB while the public API only surfaces what is live for the current market, enabling gradual geographic expansion without code deploys

nodes.label: Pricing Config
nodes.description: Canonical USD entry fees: singles=$9.99, doubles=$19.99, mixed=$19.99, mixed_doubles=$19.99. League cadence definitions: monthly(1mo), quarterly(3mo), half_yearly(6mo), yearly(12mo) with season labels

nodes.label: Rating Utils
nodes.description: ELO-style rating deltas for Tennis/Pickleball on 2.0-7.0 NTRP/DUPR scale. Staged K-factor: K=0.30 (<10 matches), K=0.15 (10-29), K=0.08 (30+). Uses conservative K of both players. Cricket ratings not handled. Clamp range 1.0-7.0

nodes.label: Round Robin Scheduler
nodes.description: Circle-method round-robin schedule generator. generate_schedule(players) returns N-1 rounds with (player_a, player_b) pairs. BYE=None for odd player counts. scoring_format_for maps sport to fast4 (tennis) or to_11 (pickleball)

nodes.label: APScheduler Setup
nodes.description: AsyncIOScheduler (UTC) wrapping three background jobs: auto_status_transitions (cron 00:05), send_match_reminders (interval 1h), auto_forfeit_stale_matches (cron 01:00)

nodes.label: Scheduler Jobs
nodes.description: Three job implementations: auto_status_transitions (upcoming->active on start_date, active->completed on end_date), send_match_reminders (email+WA for matches 23-25h out, idempotent via reminder_sent flag), auto_forfeit_stale_matches (7-day walkover for unscored matches, triggers playoff check for RR matches)

nodes.label: FastAPI Server
nodes.description: FastAPI app entry point. Mounts 16 route modules under /api prefix. Startup: seeds admin/indexes/leagues/cities/pricing/promo_codes/demo then starts APScheduler. Handles Stripe webhook inline. CORS from CORS_ORIGINS env var. MongoDB via motor AsyncIOMotorClient

nodes.label: WhatsApp Service
nodes.description: Meta Graph API v18.0 client for WhatsApp Cloud API. send_text() posts to /{phone_id}/messages. Console-log fallback when WHATSAPP_API_TOKEN/WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID unset. schedule_wa() fire-and-forget helper. verify_signature() validates X-Hub-Signature-256 webhook headers

nodes.label: User Model
nodes.description: MongoDB User document: email, name, bcrypt password_hash, role (player/admin/city_admin), sport ratings (tennis=3.0, pickleball=3.0, cricket=50.0), OTP fields, DUPR rating, gender, oauth_providers, founding_member flag

nodes.label: League Model
nodes.description: MongoDB League document: sport, format (singles/doubles/mixed/T20/T10), league_type (flex|round_robin), rr_config, division NTRP min/max, box_group_size/promote/relegate, entry_fee, currency, status lifecycle

nodes.label: Match Model
nodes.description: MongoDB Match document: player1/2 IDs and names, optional doubles partner fields (team1/2_partner), round number for RR, is_rr flag, score_data dict, status (scheduled/in_progress/completed/cancelled/walkover)

nodes.label: Standing Model
nodes.description: MongoDB Standing document with float points using formula 3W+1L+0.5(SW-SL)+0.1(GW-GL)+BP, tracking sets/games won/lost for tiebreaker resolution

nodes.label: Ladder Model
nodes.description: MongoDB Ladder document for city/sport/division ranking system. Entries list with rank, elo, challenge_cooldown_until. LadderChallenge tracks peer-to-peer rank challenges with expiry

nodes.label: notification_interests Collection
nodes.description: MongoDB collection queried by city+sport for active (non-unsubscribed) notification subscribers. Fields: email, user_id, channels (email|push), unsubscribed_at

nodes.label: push_subscriptions Collection
nodes.description: MongoDB collection storing Web Push subscription objects per user: endpoint, keys. 410 Gone responses trigger auto-cleanup

nodes.label: Admin Routes
nodes.description: Admin-only API endpoints: platform stats, user/league CRUD, payment listing, seed data, and Zelle approval queue

nodes.label: Auth Routes
nodes.description: Authentication endpoints: register, login, logout, /me, token refresh, PKCE authorize/token, OTP email verification, forgot/reset password, preference updates

nodes.label: Auto League Routes
nodes.description: Admin endpoint for idempotent bulk auto-generation of leagues by cadence (monthly/quarterly/half-yearly/yearly) per active sport and format, plus a pricing normalization utility

nodes.label: Box League Routes
nodes.description: Box league management: serpentine ELO-based box assignment, per-box standings computation, and finalization with promotion/relegation emails

nodes.label: Doubles Routes
nodes.description: Doubles invite flow: check invite status, confirm (accept/decline), cancel invite, list outgoing invites, and shared _create_doubles_pair helper consumed by payment_routes

nodes.label: Ladder Routes
nodes.description: Ladder competition management: list/create ladders, join ladder (ELO-ordered insertion), issue/accept/decline rank challenges (72h expiry), and view ladder detail with challenge eligibility flags

nodes.label: League Routes
nodes.description: Core league CRUD: phase-gated listing, my-leagues, create (with season-open notification), join (singles + doubles branch with Stripe/free path), players, standings, matches, and close with completion bonuses

nodes.label: Match Routes
nodes.description: Match scheduling (conflict detection +/-1h), score reporting, ELO rating update, standings formula (3W+1L+set/game differentials), playoff advancement, RR playoff check trigger, and ladder rank swap on match completion

nodes.label: Notification Routes
nodes.description: Notification interest management: subscribe (city+sport, auth optional), push-subscription (browser push endpoint storage), one-click unsubscribe via JWT token, and list active interests

nodes.label: Payment Routes
nodes.description: Payment processing: promo code validation, Stripe checkout session creation, payment status polling (with doubles pair creation on confirmation), available payment methods listing, Zelle intent/confirm flow, and wallet stub

nodes.label: Playoffs Routes
nodes.description: Single-elimination playoff bracket generation from top-N standings (seeded 1 vs N), bracket retrieval grouped by round, recommended top_n thresholds based on player count

nodes.label: Public Routes
nodes.description: No-auth public endpoints: city leaderboard by sport, league spectator view (standings + recent matches), public player profile with rating history, and rate-limited match challenge (3/day)

nodes.label: Round Robin Routes
nodes.description: Round-robin league lifecycle: create, list, join (singles/doubles), invite-partner flow, accept invite, schedule generation (calls rr_scheduler), standings, matches, force-close, dropout handling, and automatic playoff generation on round completion

nodes.label: Season Routes
nodes.description: Admin-managed seasons: list (phase-filtered), create, update status, delete; leagues reference season_id

nodes.label: Social Auth Routes
nodes.description: Google OAuth2 flow: generate auth URL with CSRF state nonce, exchange authorization code for tokens, verify ID token via Google tokeninfo, auto-link or create user account, set httpOnly session cookies

nodes.label: User Routes
nodes.description: User search (name/email regex, optional league filter), profile setup, rating history retrieval, profile patch (set/unset fields), and user lookup by ID

nodes.label: Waitlist Routes
nodes.description: Pre-launch waitlist: join (idempotent by email), count, and admin-only full list with city/sport breakdowns

nodes.label: WhatsApp Routes
nodes.description: WhatsApp Cloud API webhook: Meta hub.challenge verification handshake and incoming event handler (delivery/read receipts, inbound messages) with HMAC signature verification

nodes.label: Routes Package Init
nodes.description: Empty package initializer marking the routes directory as a Python package

nodes.label: seed_admin function
nodes.description: Idempotent seed function that creates or updates the admin user in MongoDB users collection with bcrypt-hashed password

nodes.label: seed_cities function
nodes.description: Idempotent seed function that inserts 15 cities (8 USA, 7 India) into the cities collection

nodes.label: seed_demo function
nodes.description: Idempotent seed that creates 8 demo tennis players and 20 match results in the NYC tennis league to populate city leaderboard

nodes.label: create_indexes function
nodes.description: Creates all MongoDB indexes across users, player_leagues, matches, standings, payment_transactions, seasons, rating_history, challenges, promo_codes, promo_uses, auth_codes, oauth_states, notification_interests, push_subscriptions, doubles_invites, waitlist, ladders, ladder_challenges collections

nodes.label: seed_leagues function
nodes.description: Idempotent seed that inserts 8 sample leagues across tennis/cricket/pickleball for USA and India cities, linked to admin user

nodes.label: normalize_pricing function
nodes.description: One-shot migration that standardizes entry_fee on all USA tennis/pickleball leagues: singles=$9.99, doubles/mixed=$19.99, using fee_for_format from pricing_config

nodes.label: seed_promo_codes function
nodes.description: Idempotent seed for launch promo codes: PLAY1FREE (free_entry, 1 use/player) and FOUNDER50 (50% off, max 200 uses)

nodes.label: seeds __init__ package
nodes.description: Package entry that exports seed_admin, seed_cities, seed_leagues, create_indexes, normalize_pricing as the public seed API

nodes.label: test_api integration tests
nodes.description: Comprehensive integration test suite covering health, auth (register/login/cookie), leagues (CRUD, phase-gating, division fields, box leagues), admin stats, matches, cities, users, ladders, pricing, mixed doubles, and phase endpoint

nodes.label: test_doubles_registration integration tests
nodes.description: End-to-end integration tests for the doubles invite flow: join with partner_email, invite status/confirm, accept/decline, paid league Stripe checkout, expiry handling

nodes.label: test_email_notifications integration tests
nodes.description: Integration tests for forgot-password, reset-password, email preferences toggle, opt-out enforcement, and free-league registration email via console log inspection

nodes.label: test_iteration5 integration tests
nodes.description: Iteration 5 backend tests: health/regression, user search/profile, seasons CRUD (phase-gating, create/patch/delete), playoffs (bracket generation), rating updates on match score, cricket phase-blocking

nodes.label: test_iteration6 integration tests
nodes.description: Iteration 6 backend tests: playoff auto-advance full bracket flow (semi-finals to final, league completion), rating-history endpoint, league-season link, regression suite

nodes.label: test_iteration7_pricing_payments integration tests
nodes.description: Iteration 7 tests: payment methods endpoint, auto-league generation (monthly/quarterly/half-yearly/yearly idempotency, 24 total), pricing normalization, wallet payments (Apple Pay, Google Pay), Zelle intent/confirm, free league join

nodes.label: test_match_emails integration tests
nodes.description: End-to-end test verifying that match scheduling and score reporting emit console email logs to both players

nodes.label: test_notifications integration tests
nodes.description: Integration tests for notification routes: anonymous subscribe (idempotent), push subscription (auth required), unsubscribe via token; uses PKCE auth flow for player sessions

nodes.label: test_public_endpoints integration tests
nodes.description: Tests for public endpoints: health, Challenge model import/instantiation, city leaderboard (no PII), league spectator, challenge auth guard, WhatsApp webhook verification

nodes.label: test_rr_scheduler unit tests
nodes.description: Unit tests for rr_scheduler module: round-robin schedule generation for even/odd player counts (bye handling), all-pairs coverage, scoring format lookup

nodes.label: CITIES constant
nodes.description: Static list of 15 cities: 8 USA (NY, LA, Chicago, SF, Atlanta, Houston, Phoenix, Seattle) and 7 India (Mumbai, Delhi, Bangalore, Chennai, Hyderabad, Pune, Kolkata)

nodes.label: LEAGUES constant
nodes.description: Static list of 8 sample leagues: NYC Tennis, Mumbai Cricket, LA Pickleball, SF Doubles Tennis (free), Delhi Cricket T10, Atlanta Mixed Doubles, Bangalore Cricket T20, Chicago Tennis

nodes.label: LAUNCH_PROMOS constant
nodes.description: Two launch promo codes: PLAY1FREE (free_entry, unlimited uses, 1/user) and FOUNDER50 (50% off, max 200 global uses)

nodes.label: DEMO_PLAYERS constant
nodes.description: 8 demo tennis players with realistic ELO ratings (1400-1680) all in New York, with venlaxsports.com email addresses

nodes.label: pricing_config module
nodes.description: Canonical pricing configuration providing fee_for_format() function: singles=$9.99, doubles/mixed=$19.99

nodes.label: rr_scheduler module
nodes.description: Round-robin schedule generator and scoring_format_for() lookup used by test_rr_scheduler

nodes.label: shadcn/ui Components Config
nodes.description: shadcn/ui configuration declaring style (new-york), alias mappings (@/components, @/lib/utils, @/hooks), Tailwind integration, and lucide as icon library

nodes.label: Craco Config
nodes.description: Craco webpack config that sets @-alias to src/, conditionally loads WebpackHealthPlugin and health endpoints, enforces react-hooks ESLint rules, and optionally wraps with @emergentbase/visual-edits in dev mode

nodes.label: JS Path Config
nodes.description: JS compiler options setting baseUrl to . and @/* path alias pointing to src/*

nodes.label: Frontend Package Manifest
nodes.description: Frontend package.json listing React 19, react-router-dom v7, shadcn/ui Radix primitives, recharts, axios, react-hook-form, zod, Stripe-adjacent libs; build tool craco; package manager yarn

nodes.label: PostCSS Config
nodes.description: PostCSS configuration enabling tailwindcss and autoprefixer plugins

nodes.label: Tailwind Config
nodes.description: Tailwind v3 config defining custom color palette (espresso, rust, sand, navy, lime, teal, tennis, cricket, pickleball), fonts (Barlow Condensed heading, Barlow body), keyframe animations, and tailwindcss-animate plugin

nodes.label: Health Endpoints
nodes.description: Dev-server middleware registering six HTTP health endpoints that query WebpackHealthPlugin for build state

nodes.label: Webpack Health Plugin
nodes.description: Webpack plugin that hooks into compiler lifecycle to track build state, error/warning lists, and compile timing metrics

nodes.label: Service Worker
nodes.description: PWA service worker handling push notifications and notificationclick events to open/focus app windows

nodes.label: App Root Component
nodes.description: React app entry: wraps in AuthProvider + BrowserRouter, conditionally shows PreLaunch based on REACT_APP_PRELAUNCH env, lazy-loads all route pages, renders Navbar and Footer in AppShell

nodes.label: React Entry Point
nodes.description: ReactDOM.createRoot entry mounting App in StrictMode; also registers the service worker on load

nodes.label: Brand Config
nodes.description: Single source of truth for VENLAX brand constants: name, domain, emails, taglines, brand pillars (V/E/X), and logo wordmark breakdown

nodes.label: Platform Config
nodes.description: Phase-driven platform configuration exporting activeSports, activeSportMap, activeSportIds, activeCountry, and isSportActive based on REACT_APP_PHASE env var

nodes.label: Auth Context
nodes.description: React context providing auth state and actions; login uses Web Crypto PKCE with SHA-256 code challenge against /api/auth/authorize and /api/auth/token

nodes.label: useToast Hook
nodes.description: Custom toast state manager: module-level reducer + listener array pattern enabling toast() and useToast() without a context provider

nodes.label: cn Utility
nodes.description: Single cn() helper combining clsx and tailwind-merge for conditional class composition

nodes.label: Footer Component
nodes.description: Site footer rendering sport links from activeSports, platform nav links, featured cities from platformConfig, and brand copyright

nodes.label: ForgotPasswordModal Component
nodes.description: Modal component for password reset: posts to /api/auth/forgot-password, shows sent confirmation state with 30-minute expiry notice

nodes.label: HowItWorks Component
nodes.description: Marketing section showing six numbered steps of the league competition process

nodes.label: Logo Component
nodes.description: SVG logo component rendering VENLAX wordmark with three sport dots; supports sm/md/lg/xl/hero sizes and default/light/hero variants

nodes.label: Accordion Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Accordion built on @radix-ui/react-accordion; exports AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, AccordionContent with cn() styling

nodes.label: AlertDialog Component

nodes.label: Alert Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Alert with default and destructive variants using cva; AlertTitle and AlertDescription subcomponents

nodes.label: AspectRatio Component
nodes.description: Thin re-export of @radix-ui/react-aspect-ratio for consistent aspect-ratio containers

nodes.label: Avatar Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Avatar on @radix-ui/react-avatar; exports Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback with rounded-full styling

nodes.label: Badge Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Badge with cva variants: default, secondary, destructive, outline; small inline status indicator

nodes.label: Breadcrumb Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Breadcrumb with nav, list, item, link, page, separator, ellipsis subcomponents for navigation hierarchy

nodes.label: Button Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Button with cva variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon); supports asChild via Radix Slot

nodes.label: Calendar Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Calendar built on react-day-picker; date selection with navigation chevrons, styled day cells

nodes.label: Card Component

nodes.label: Carousel Component

nodes.label: Checkbox Component

nodes.label: Collapsible Component
nodes.description: Thin re-export of @radix-ui/react-collapsible Collapsible, CollapsibleTrigger, CollapsibleContent

nodes.label: Command Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Command palette on cmdk; exports Command, CommandDialog, CommandInput, CommandList, CommandEmpty, CommandGroup, CommandItem, CommandShortcut, CommandSeparator

nodes.label: ContextMenu Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui ContextMenu on @radix-ui/react-context-menu; right-click menu with Item, CheckboxItem, RadioItem, Label, Separator, SubTrigger, SubContent, Portal

nodes.label: Dialog Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Dialog on @radix-ui/react-dialog; exports Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogPortal, DialogOverlay, DialogContent (with X close button), DialogHeader, DialogFooter, DialogTitle, DialogDescription

nodes.label: Drawer Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Drawer on vaul; bottom-sheet style drawer with Overlay, Content, Header, Footer, Title, Description

nodes.label: DropdownMenu Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui DropdownMenu on @radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu; trigger-activated menu with Item, CheckboxItem, RadioItem, Label, Separator, SubTrigger, SubContent, Portal

nodes.label: Form Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Form integration layer for react-hook-form; exports Form, FormField, FormItem, FormLabel, FormControl, FormDescription, FormMessage using useFormContext and Controller

nodes.label: HoverCard Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui HoverCard on @radix-ui/react-hover-card; hover-triggered popover for preview content

nodes.label: InputOTP Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui InputOTP on input-otp package; segmented OTP input with InputOTPGroup, InputOTPSlot, InputOTPSeparator

nodes.label: Input Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Input; styled HTML input with focus-visible ring, disabled:opacity-50, consistent height

nodes.label: Label Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Label on @radix-ui/react-label with cva; peer-disabled:opacity-70 for form accessibility

nodes.label: Menubar Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Menubar on @radix-ui/react-menubar; horizontal application menubar with Menu, Trigger, Content, Item, CheckboxItem, RadioItem, SubTrigger, SubContent

nodes.label: NavigationMenu Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui NavigationMenu on @radix-ui/react-navigation-menu; top-nav with hover dropdowns, NavigationMenuList, Item, Trigger, Content, Link, Indicator, Viewport

nodes.label: Pagination Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Pagination; exports Pagination, PaginationContent, PaginationItem, PaginationLink, PaginationPrevious, PaginationNext, PaginationEllipsis built with Button component

nodes.label: Popover Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Popover on @radix-ui/react-popover; floating content panel anchored to trigger element

nodes.label: Progress Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Progress on @radix-ui/react-progress; horizontal progress bar with animated indicator, value prop controls width

nodes.label: RadioGroup Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui RadioGroup on @radix-ui/react-radio-group; RadioGroup container and RadioGroupItem with CircleIcon indicator

nodes.description: shadcn/ui Resizable on react-resizable-panels; ResizablePanelGroup, ResizablePanel, ResizableHandle for split-pane layouts

nodes.label: ScrollArea Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui ScrollArea on @radix-ui/react-scroll-area; custom-styled scrollbar overlay with Viewport, ScrollBar, Corner

nodes.label: Select Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Select on @radix-ui/react-select; custom dropdown selector with SelectTrigger, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectLabel, SelectSeparator, SelectScrollUpButton, SelectScrollDownButton

nodes.label: Separator Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Separator on @radix-ui/react-separator; thin hr/vr divider line with horizontal/vertical orientation

nodes.label: Sheet Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Sheet on @radix-ui/react-dialog; slide-in panel from top/right/bottom/left edge, SheetContent uses side cva variants

nodes.label: Skeleton Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Skeleton; pulsing gray placeholder for loading states, accepts className for sizing

nodes.label: Slider Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Slider on @radix-ui/react-slider; range/single-value slider with Track, Range, Thumb

nodes.label: Sonner Toaster
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Sonner integration; wraps Toaster from sonner package with theme-aware styling

nodes.label: Switch Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Switch on @radix-ui/react-switch; toggle with Thumb that slides on state change

nodes.label: Table Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Table; semantic HTML table wrappers: Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableFooter, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell, TableCaption with responsive overflow

nodes.label: Tabs Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Tabs on @radix-ui/react-tabs; TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent for tab-panel navigation

nodes.label: Textarea Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Textarea; styled multi-line text input matching Input component styling

nodes.label: Toast Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Toast on @radix-ui/react-toast; ToastProvider, ToastViewport, Toast, ToastTitle, ToastDescription, ToastClose, ToastAction with variant cva

nodes.label: Toaster Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Toaster; renders active toasts from useToast hook state into ToastProvider/ToastViewport

nodes.label: ToggleGroup Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui ToggleGroup on @radix-ui/react-toggle-group; multi-item toggle bar where items share variant context

nodes.label: Toggle Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Toggle on @radix-ui/react-toggle; single pressed/unpressed button with default/outline/sm/lg variants via cva

nodes.label: Tooltip Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Tooltip on @radix-ui/react-tooltip; TooltipProvider wraps app, Tooltip+TooltipTrigger+TooltipContent for hover hints

nodes.label: Navbar Component
nodes.description: Sticky glassmorphism navbar: VENLAX Logo, sport nav links from activeSports, auth state buttons (Login/Dashboard), mobile hamburger menu. Reads AuthContext and platformConfig.

nodes.label: NotifyMeBanner Component
nodes.description: Inline banner CTA prompting users to subscribe for league open notifications; posts to /api/notifications/subscribe

nodes.label: NotifyMeModal Component
nodes.description: Modal version of notification subscription: city + sport preference selection, email input, posts to /api/notifications/subscribe

nodes.label: OpponentSearch Component
nodes.description: Combobox for searching players by name/email within a league; calls GET /api/users/search?q= with optional league_id filter

nodes.label: PartnerSearch Component
nodes.description: Combobox for finding doubles partner by email; calls GET /api/users/search?q= to find partner before initiating doubles invite flow

nodes.label: PaymentMethodModal Component
nodes.description: Payment method selection modal shown before league join: Stripe card (redirect to checkout), Apple Pay/Google Pay (wallet stubs), Zelle (intent flow). Initiator_paid pattern for doubles.

nodes.label: RatingHistoryChart Component
nodes.description: Recharts LineChart rendering player ELO rating history over time; fetches from /api/users/me/rating-history with sport filter

nodes.label: RRBracketView Component
nodes.description: Visual bracket display for round-robin playoff stage; renders seeded matchups by round, shows winner advancement

nodes.label: RRScheduleView Component
nodes.description: Table view of generated round-robin match schedule grouped by round; shows player pairs, round number, match status

nodes.label: AdminDashboard Page
nodes.description: Admin panel with tabbed subtabs: Platform Stats, Users list/edit, Leagues CRUD, Payments/Zelle approvals, Seed Data controls. Restricted to admin role via AuthContext.

nodes.label: Auth Page
nodes.description: Login/register form with tab switching; handles PKCE authorize flow, Google OAuth redirect, OTP email verification; shows ForgotPasswordModal

nodes.label: CityLeaderboard Page
nodes.description: Public city-level sport leaderboard; fetches /api/public/leaderboard/:city/:sport, displays player rankings with ratings, no auth required

nodes.label: DoublesInviteConfirm Page
nodes.description: Landing page for doubles invite token link; shows invite details (league, partner name), accept/decline actions, redirects to payment if accepted

nodes.label: Home Page
nodes.description: Main landing page: hero section, sport cards (Tennis/Pickleball/Cricket), HowItWorks section, city stats, active leagues strip, CTA. Fetches /api/leagues and /api/cities.

nodes.label: JoinFlow Page
nodes.description: Multi-step league join wizard: auth check → payment method modal → doubles partner search (if doubles format) → confirmation. Orchestrates PaymentMethodModal and PartnerSearch.

nodes.label: LadderDetail Page
nodes.description: Detailed view of a ladder: ordered player list with ELO ranks, challenge buttons (72h cooldown enforcement), active challenge statuses, join button for non-members

nodes.label: Ladders Page
nodes.description: Lists all available ladders by sport/city; links to LadderDetail; shows join status per ladder

nodes.label: LeagueDetail Page
nodes.description: Individual league view: standings table, match schedule, score reporting link, player roster, league status badge, playoff bracket (if generated). Uses RRBracketView for round-robin leagues.

nodes.label: Leagues Page
nodes.description: League listing page: filters by sport, city, format, season; shows entry fee, spots remaining, join button. Phase-gated — only active sports shown.

nodes.label: LeagueSpectator Page
nodes.description: Public no-auth league view; shows standings and recent match results fetched from /api/public/leagues/:id/spectate

nodes.label: OAuthCallback Page
nodes.description: Handles Google OAuth callback: exchanges code for session via /api/auth/google/session, sets auth state, redirects to dashboard

nodes.label: PlayerDashboard Page
nodes.description: Authenticated player hub: my leagues, upcoming matches, schedule match (OpponentSearch), rating history chart, doubles invites, notification preferences

nodes.label: PreLaunch Page
nodes.description: Pre-launch waitlist page shown when REACT_APP_PRELAUNCH=true; email + city + sport sign-up form posting to /api/waitlist/join; flip env var to go live

nodes.label: ProfileSetup Page
nodes.description: First-run profile wizard: name, sport ratings (NTRP/DUPR), city selection, gender; posts to /api/users/profile-setup

nodes.label: PublicProfile Page
nodes.description: Public player profile view: name, sport ratings, recent match history, city; fetches /api/public/players/:userId, no auth required. Challenge button visible to logged-in players.

nodes.label: ResetPassword Page
nodes.description: Password reset form; reads token from URL params, posts new password to /api/auth/reset-password/:token, shows success/error state

nodes.label: RoundRobinDetail Page
nodes.description: Round-robin league detail: schedule view (RRScheduleView), standings table, bracket (RRBracketView when playoffs generated), join/dropout buttons, round progress indicator

nodes.label: RoundRobinInvite Page
nodes.description: Doubles partner invite flow for round-robin leagues: shows invite details, accept triggers payment flow for partner, decline removes invite

nodes.label: RoundRobinLeagues Page
nodes.description: Listing page for round-robin format leagues filtered by sport; shows player count, schedule release date, entry fee, join button

nodes.label: Rules Page
nodes.description: Game rules and platform rules for all active sports; sections for Tennis, Pickleball rules, match format explanations, code of conduct

nodes.label: ScoreReport Page
nodes.description: Score submission form for a scheduled match; set/game score inputs, PATCH /api/matches/:id/score; triggers ELO update + standings recalc on backend

nodes.label: SportLanding Page
nodes.description: Individual sport marketing page (Tennis/Pickleball/Cricket) with sport-specific hero, format explanations, city availability, active league CTAs

nodes.label: Standings Page
nodes.description: League standings table: shows rank, player name, wins/losses, points (3W+1L formula), set/game differentials; fetches /api/leagues/:id/standings

nodes.label: Terms Page
nodes.description: Terms of Service and Privacy Policy page with section anchors; static legal content for VENLAX Sports platform

nodes.label: VerifyEmail Page
nodes.description: OTP email verification page; 6-digit code input, posts to /api/auth/verify-otp, auto-redirect on success, resend option after 60s cooldown

nodes.label: Match Score API Endpoint
nodes.description: PATCH /api/matches/:id/score — records score_data, determines winner, triggers ELO rating update via rating_utils, recalculates standings, auto-advances RR playoffs

nodes.label: City Leaderboard API
nodes.description: GET /api/public/leaderboard/:city/:sport — returns top players by rating for a city/sport combination, strips PII

nodes.label: Round Robin Join API
nodes.description: POST /api/round-robin/:id/join — singles and doubles join paths; doubles triggers invite flow with partner_email; payment gating via Stripe or free path

nodes.label: Ladder Challenge API
nodes.description: POST /api/ladders/:id/challenge — rank-constrained peer challenge with 72h expiry; accept/decline endpoints; ELO-based rank swap on match completion

nodes.label: Iteration 1 Test Report
nodes.description: QA test results for iteration 1: auth (register/login/cookie), league CRUD, player join, match scheduling. First green baseline for the platform.

nodes.label: Iteration 2 Test Report
nodes.description: QA results for iteration 2: ELO rating updates, standings formula (3W+1L), score reporting, admin endpoints, city leaderboard.

nodes.label: Iteration 3 Test Report
nodes.description: QA results for iteration 3: playoffs bracket generation, season management, division NTRP gating, phase gating (cricket blocked in phase 1).

nodes.label: Iteration 4 Test Report
nodes.description: QA results for iteration 4: payment flows (Stripe redirect, Zelle intent/confirm), promo codes (PLAY1FREE, FOUNDER50), doubles invite flow end-to-end.

nodes.label: Iteration 5 Test Report
nodes.description: QA results for iteration 5: auto-league generation (24 leagues across cadences), pricing normalization, round-robin scheduler, box league ELO assignment.

nodes.label: Iteration 6 Test Report
nodes.description: QA results for iteration 6: full playoff auto-advance bracket (semis to final), rating history endpoint, ladder challenges, notification subscribe/push routes.

nodes.label: Iteration 7 Test Report
nodes.description: QA results for iteration 7: round-robin leagues (create/join/schedule/standings/bracket), WhatsApp webhook, PKCE auth flow, doubles RR invites.

nodes.label: Auth Testing Notes
nodes.description: Developer notes on PKCE flow testing, httpOnly cookie behavior across browsers, Google OAuth session cookie debugging, 307 redirect fix documentation

nodes.label: CLAUDE.md
nodes.description: Project instructions for Claude Code: stack overview, dev commands, architecture (phase gating, backend layout, frontend layout), design system, deployment templates, skill routing rules

nodes.label: DEPLOYMENT.md
nodes.description: Deployment guide: Coolify setup on VPS, env var configuration for USA/India phases, MongoDB Atlas connection, CORS config, CI=false fix, DNS/SSL steps

nodes.label: PRODUCT.md
nodes.description: Product specification: target personas (competitive amateur athlete, league organizer), brand pillars (V/E/X), product principles, feature roadmap by phase, competitive differentiation vs. local Facebook groups

nodes.label: README.md
nodes.description: Project overview README: sports supported, tech stack, quick-start commands, environment setup, feature list

nodes.label: test_result.md
nodes.description: Latest test run summary: pass/fail counts per test file, known failures with root cause notes, instructions for running specific test suites

nodes.label: TODOS.md
nodes.description: Active task backlog: pending items include SMTP email provider, pre-launch flip, Stripe live key, WhatsApp Meta approval, plus completed items marked done

nodes.label: Phase Gating Pattern
nodes.description: Architectural decision: phase-driven gating (phase 1=USA Tennis+Pickleball) allows gradual geographic/sport expansion without code deploys; both frontend platformConfig and backend phase_config must stay in sync

nodes.label: ELO Rating System
nodes.description: NTRP/DUPR-mapped ELO system (2.0-7.0 scale) with staged K-factors (0.30/<10 matches, 0.15/10-29, 0.08/30+) for tennis and pickleball; cricket uses separate 50.0 base

nodes.label: Coolify Deployment Architecture
nodes.description: Self-hosted Coolify on VPS for Docker-based deployment; separates frontend (React static) and backend (FastAPI) as distinct Coolify applications with env var management

nodes.label: CORS Credentials Bug
nodes.description: Bug encountered: httpOnly cookies not sent cross-origin until CORS_ORIGINS matched exact frontend URL and credentials:true set in axios. Required allow_credentials=True in FastAPI CORS middleware.

nodes.label: Flex/Round Robin Plan
nodes.description: Implementation plan for round-robin league format: circle-method scheduler, per-round standings, invite flow for doubles, schedule release mechanics, playoff auto-generation

nodes.label: Referral Engine Plan
nodes.description: Viral growth plan: referral codes with credit rewards, friend-invite league join flow, WhatsApp share links, leaderboard social proof, 6 expansion vectors

nodes.label: B2 Smart Notifications Plan
nodes.description: Smart notification system plan: capacity-milestone triggers (50%, 80%, full), Web Push integration, city+sport subscription preferences, one-click unsubscribe via JWT token

nodes.label: Box League Plan
nodes.description: Box league format plan: serpentine ELO-based box assignment, per-box standings, promotion/relegation between boxes, finalization with email notifications

nodes.label: Challenge Ladder Plan
nodes.description: Ladder competition plan: ELO-ordered ranking list, rank-constrained challenges (can only challenge ±3 positions), 72h expiry, rank swap on win, cooldown period

nodes.label: DUPR Mixed Doubles Plan
nodes.description: DUPR rating integration and mixed doubles format plan: gender-balanced team formation, DUPR score import/export, mixed doubles specific scoring rules

nodes.label: Landing Conversion Plan
nodes.description: Homepage conversion optimization plan: hero redesign, social proof metrics, city/sport targeting, trust signals, above-fold CTA optimization

nodes.label: Skill Division Plan
nodes.description: Division-based skill grouping plan: NTRP-range gating for tennis divisions (beginner 2.0-3.0, intermediate 3.0-4.0, advanced 4.0+), auto-promotion on rating milestone

nodes.label: Stitch DESIGN.md
nodes.description: Design system extracted from VenLax codebase: dark navy/lime/teal palette, Barlow Condensed headings, sport color tokens (tennis=#10B981, cricket=#2563EB, pickleball=#F97316), card/button patterns

nodes.label: Memory PRD
nodes.description: Persistent memory product requirements document: platform goals, user personas (competitive amateur, league organizer), key metrics (MAU, retention, NPS)

nodes.label: Backend Requirements
nodes.description: Python dependency manifest: FastAPI, uvicorn, motor (MongoDB async), pydantic, bcrypt, PyJWT, aiosmtplib, stripe (emergentintegrations), pywebpush, apscheduler

nodes.label: Frontend README
nodes.description: CRA/craco frontend README: available scripts (yarn start/build/test), environment variable setup, known craco configuration notes

nodes.label: Agent Skills Directory
nodes.description: Directory containing agent skill configurations for the VenLax project; holds context files and skill routing for Claude Code agent invocations

nodes.label: Claude Skills Settings
nodes.description: Project-level Claude Code settings: allowlisted bash commands, MCP tool permissions, skill invocation settings

nodes.label: Emergent Configuration
nodes.description: Emergent Auth/Base configuration: OAuth provider settings, visual edit plugin configuration, application metadata for VENLAX Sports

nodes.label: Logo Archive v1 (Dark Shield)
nodes.description: First logo exploration: dark shield/crest badge with VENLAX wordmark in white on dark background; bold protective brand identity

nodes.label: Logo Archive v2 (Teal Minimal)
nodes.description: Second logo iteration: clean teal-on-white wordmark, minimal geometric dots representing three sports; approved direction

nodes.label: Logo Archive v3 (Orange Accent)
nodes.description: Third logo variant: orange accent color replacing teal; explores pickleball-dominant brand identity

nodes.label: Logo Archive v4 (Stripe Stack)
nodes.description: Fourth logo iteration: Stripe-inspired stacked wordmark with three sport color dots inline; selected as final logo (deployed in Logo.jsx)

nodes.label: Logo Archive v5 (Mono Black)
nodes.description: Fifth logo exploration: pure monochrome black wordmark; high contrast, print-friendly alternative

nodes.label: Stitch Home Snapshot
nodes.description: Self-contained HTML snapshot of the VenLax homepage rendered at 1280px; captured for Stitch design iteration and AI-assisted UI improvement

nodes.label: Stitch Leagues Snapshot
nodes.description: Self-contained HTML snapshot of the Leagues listing page; includes active league cards, sport filters, entry fee display

nodes.label: Stitch Dashboard Snapshot
nodes.description: Self-contained HTML snapshot of the PlayerDashboard; shows my leagues, upcoming matches, rating chart area

nodes.label: Stitch SportLanding Snapshot
nodes.description: Self-contained HTML snapshot of the Tennis sport landing page; sport hero, format explanations, city availability

nodes.label: Frontend index.html
nodes.description: HTML entry point: meta tags (viewport, theme-color), Google Fonts import (Outfit, DM Sans, Barlow Condensed, Barlow), PWA manifest link, root div

nodes.label: Homepage Desktop Screenshot
nodes.description: Desktop screenshot of VenLax homepage (1280px) showing the earthy orange/sand rebrand: hero with navy headline, rust CTA button, sport cards in three columns. Captured pre-redesign audit.

nodes.label: Homepage Mobile Screenshot
nodes.description: Mobile screenshot (375px) of homepage: single-column sport cards, collapsed nav, hero text reflow. Shows responsive breakpoint behavior.

nodes.label: Leagues Desktop Screenshot
nodes.description: Desktop screenshot of Leagues page: card grid with sport color badges, entry fee chips, city labels, spots-remaining indicator, join buttons

nodes.label: Player Dashboard Screenshot
nodes.description: PlayerDashboard screenshot: my leagues section, upcoming matches list, schedule match panel with opponent search, ELO rating display

nodes.label: Sport Landing Screenshot
nodes.description: Tennis sport landing page screenshot: sport hero with green (#10B981) color theme, format cards (singles/doubles), city availability grid

nodes.label: Hero Section Pattern
nodes.description: Homepage hero UI pattern: full-width background with headline, subheadline, primary CTA button. Current implementation uses navy text on light background with rust/orange CTA.

nodes.label: Stats Bar Component
nodes.description: Horizontal stats strip showing platform metrics: active players count, leagues count, cities count. Trust signal element in homepage conversion funnel.

nodes.label: HowItWorks Grid Pattern
nodes.description: 6-step numbered grid explaining the league process; each step has number, title, description. Marketing section for conversion.

nodes.label: Sport Platform Section
nodes.description: Three-column sport cards (Tennis/Pickleball/Cricket) each with sport color, icon, active leagues count, join CTA. Primary navigation entry point from homepage.

nodes.label: Active Leagues Strip
nodes.description: Horizontal scrollable strip showing active league cards with sport, city, format, spots remaining. Social proof element showing real activity.

nodes.label: City Picker Grid
nodes.description: Grid of city buttons/chips allowing geographic filtering of leagues; shows which cities have active leagues

nodes.label: CTA Banner Footer
nodes.description: Full-width CTA banner section near page bottom: bold headline, sign-up/join button. Final conversion opportunity before footer.

nodes.label: VENLAX Logo (Primary)
nodes.description: Primary VENLAX Sports logo on white background: horizontal wordmark with VEN in black, LAX in teal/emerald, SPORTS in smaller caps. Three sport dots (green/blue/orange) inline. Used as primary brand asset.

nodes.label: VENLAX Logo (Transparent)
nodes.description: VENLAX Sports logo on transparent background; same wordmark as primary but PNG-transparent for use on colored backgrounds. Light variant with white text for dark surfaces.

nodes.label: Logo Icon (Favicon)
nodes.description: Compact square icon version of VENLAX brand mark: simplified geometric VX letterform or sport dots pattern. Used as favicon and PWA icon at 192px and 512px sizes.

nodes.label: Logo Shield Badge
nodes.description: VENLAX shield/crest badge variant: hexagonal or shield shape containing VX monogram or full wordmark. Dark background with teal/lime accents. Sport crest aesthetic for merchandise and social media profile.

nodes.label: Logo PNG (Public)
nodes.description: General-purpose logo PNG in public directory; serves as OG image fallback and meta tag image reference. Standard dimensions for social sharing previews.

nodes.label: Logo PNG (Src Assets)
nodes.description: Logo PNG in src/assets directory for webpack/craco bundling; imported directly in React components as a module. Same visual as public/logo.png but processed through asset pipeline.
